title: Debug assertion sqlite3VdbeExec: Assertion `memIsValid(pRec)' failed
description:
mrigger added on 2019-12-27 20:51:04:
The following test case triggers a debug assertion error:
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, c1 AS(c0) UNIQUE);
REPLACE INTO t0 VALUES(NULL); -- sqlite3.c:87334: sqlite3VdbeExec: Assertion `memIsValid(pRec)' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, c1 VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 FLOAT NOT NULL, c1 INTEGER UNIQUE);
key_bug_features: REPLACE INTO with NULL on UNIQUE generated column
